title: Pan-Seared Snapper with Egyptian Flair
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish that combines the delicate taste of snapper with the bold flavors of Egyptian spices.

ingredients.name: Egyptian Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: 1. Season the snapper fillets with salt, black pepper, and Egyptian spice blend.
2. Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
4. Add the snapper fillets and sear for 3-4 minutes on each side.
5. Transfer the snapper to a plate and set aside.
6. Add the sliced fennel to the skillet and sauté for 2-3 minutes until tender.
7. Stir in the chopped capers and lemon juice.
8. Return the snapper to the skillet and serve with the fennel and caper sauce.
9. Garnish with fresh herbs and lemon wedges.
